entries.name: Adventurer's Pack
entries.description: A torch, bedroll, scrap of jerky, apple, pipe, and rope. This rucksack has been through so much, you're not sure what's inside.

entries.name: Miner's Pack
entries.description: Pick hammer, lantern, fire-starting oil and flint, compass, breather mask. A heavy duty canvas pack scuffed with coal and chalk.

entries.name: Polar Pack
entries.description: This fur-lined pack is built into a warm seal skin cloak. It contains a fire pot, fur mittens, snow-blind goggles, ski poles, boots and rope.

entries.name: Fisherman's Satchel
entries.description: Mesh creel, two fishing poles, tackle box, fillet knife and basket snare. Also includes swim fins and a clumsy glass diving mask.

entries.name: Mender's Toolbox
entries.description: Hammer and pliers, rivets, scrap steel, leather strips, spare buckles and iron nails. Use for anything from armor to boat repair.

entries.name: Healer's Case
entries.description: Using this kit of bandages, tinctures and serums, heal 1 HP on an ally with an INT or WIS roll. Includes bottles, scalpel, and anti-venom.

entries.name: Climbing Gear
entries.description: Grapple hooks, extreme rope, steel belt clips, 2 pairs of boot crampons, iron spikes and hammer. Worn over one shoulder.

entries.name: Mixed Armor Garb
entries.description: Common garb for adventurers, a mix of padded gambeson, leather belts, and armor odds & ends. +2 DEFENSE

entries.name: Heavy Plate and Chain Armor
entries.description: A cumbersome set of steel plates, chainmail, and steel boots for heavy combat. +4 DEFENSE, DEX rolls always HARD

entries.name: Common Shield
entries.description: A round wooden shield and strap suited for travel on foot. +2 DEFENSE. If hit, sacrifice the shield to absorb all of any 1 attack.

entries.name: Iron Shield
entries.description: This heavy shield is steel with iron bands. +3 DEFENSE. While using this shield, you cannot use one hand, occupies 2 inventory spaces.

entries.name: Traveler's Garb
entries.description: A lighter, more comfortable set of clothes for travelers. Only +1 DEFENSE, but includes 2 extra spaces for inventory.

entries.name: Sword and Scabbard
entries.description: A trusty blade of whatever size or make suits your training, leather sheath, belts, and sharpening kit if the blade is damaged.

entries.name: Battle Axe and Harness
entries.description: A huge chopping weapon of one or two blades. Damage timbers or structures, but impossible to conceal.

entries.name: Spearman's Kit
entries.description: A ten foot oak shaft with swappable blade tip that can be switched to hook, spearhead, or glaive. Can attack targets up to NEAR range.

entries.name: Bow and Quiver
entries.description: A recurve bow, either short for small spaces or long for outdoor use. Quiver empty on attack rolls of natural 1. Carry a spare quiver if possible!

entries.name: Crossbow and Bolt Kit
entries.description: A powerful mechanical weapon. Critical hits on natural 19 or 20. The bolt kit allows for incendiary, smoke, or flare tips.

entries.name: Warhammer
entries.description: A hefty, blocky weapon for smashing. Hits of 5-10 damage destroy 1 point of enemy DEFENSE, 10+ also stuns the target for 1 ROUND.

entries.name: Great Sword
entries.description: A tremendous two-handed blade 5 feet long. This weapon occupies 3 inventory spaces, but always inflicts ULTIMATE damage.

entries.name: Knife Belt
entries.description: A sling of sorts which holds up to 8 daggers and throwing knives in concealed scabbards. One scabbard includes a poison-protective sheath.

entries.name: Knight's Weapon Kit
entries.description: A heavy black belt with a spiked mace and chain flail on steel rings. Used against shields, degrades DEFENSE by 1 on each hit.

entries.name: Quarter Staff and Wraps
entries.description: A wooden walking staff fire tempered for hardness, 4 feet in length. Includes fist-wraps for unarmed fighters.

entries.name: Exotic Weaponry
entries.description: Strange or unusual weapons from far away lands include chain whips, nunchaku, segment staff, and sword-of-rings. Work with your GM!

entries.name: Maps
entries.description: A humble wooden tube filled with regional maps and specific location plan views. Roll INT to check for a useful map once per location.

table_name: Warp Shell Basic Loot - Packs & Armor

entries.name: Scan Unit
entries.description: A compact, comprehensive scanner and electronics unit. Use 1 TURN to 'run a scan.' The data gathered reduces the current TARGET by 1.

entries.name: Away Team Pack
entries.description: Belt pouch with hand lamp, micro cutting torch, reel of cable, leak sealant slap-patch, 10 minute air canister, and emergency locator beacon.

entries.name: Salvage Kit
entries.description: A backpack for deep space retrieval. Heavy winch grappler, heavy cutting torch, 2 magnet anchors, pick hammer, 2 magnetic flood lights.

entries.name: Xeno Response Pack
entries.description: Tools for collecting / analyzing biological specimens. Collapsible clear tube, respirator, dissection kit, sample vials.

entries.name: Medical Kit
entries.description: Emergency first aid with bandages and antidotes. Roll WIS or INT to heal an ally for 1 HP. On a natural 1, the kit is empty. Refill on any ship.

entries.name: Vac Suit
entries.description: +1 DEFENSE. Nanotechnology integrates into any clothing for deep space operation, including energy helmet, gloves, and x-wave radio unit.

entries.name: Hard Suit
entries.description: +3 DEFENSE. A vac suit with an armored exterior for dangerous space work. DEX rolls are never EASY, stealth rolls only succeed on natural 20.

entries.name: Link Armor
entries.description: +1 DEFENSE. A light reinforcement to any clothing made from tiny links of nonmetallic ceramic material.

entries.name: Plasteel Armor
entries.description: +3 DEFENSE. Heavy armor plating ignores any attack of 2 or less damage, but the bulk of it makes DEX rolls always HARD.

entries.name: Energy Shield
entries.description: A small wrist unit that is activated to emit a glowing round force shield. +2 DEFENSE. DEFENSE rolls against energy weapons are EASY.

entries.name: Vibro Blade
entries.description: A duranium blade with vibrating nano-blades to enhance cutting effect. Critical success on natural 19 or 20. Also unbreakable by physical means.

entries.name: Energy Blade
entries.description: An elegant weapon from a civilized time. Does ENERGY damage. On a natural 1, the weightless blade cuts its user for 1 HP damage.

table_name: Warp Shell Basic Loot - Weapons & Items

entries.name: Pulse Rifle
entries.description: Advanced Reptoid war tech, uses a power cell as ammo. It never runs out. On a natural 1, the rifle goes wild, hitting a random target.

entries.name: Particle Cannon
entries.description: A heavy military weapon. Occupies 3 inventory slots. Sprays of fire hit 1D4 enemy targets on a successful attack, each taking the damage rolled.

entries.name: Blast Rifle
entries.description: A classic, reliable long gun. Spend 1 TURN aiming to either hit with no roll or inflict maximum damage on a rolled hit.

entries.name: Blaster
entries.description: The sturdy, basic sidearm of space. Easily concealed under any armor or clothes. Occupies NO inventory space. 'Spacer's best friend.'

entries.name: Chem Rail
entries.description: A charged ion rail gun that slowly builds powerful shots. Add another GUN damage die for each TURN spent powering up a single shot.

entries.name: Ripsaw
entries.description: A carbon-toothed chainsaw weapon designed to tear apart armor and equipment. For each 5 damage inflicted, remove 1 DEFENSE, or destroy 1 item.

entries.name: Ion Grenade Sling
entries.description: A bandolier of 6 explosives which can work on a D4 ROUND fuse or be set to explode on impact. ULTIMATE damage in a NEAR radius.

entries.name: Karambit Blades
entries.description: Small talon knives designed for killing. Occupies no inventory space. Easily concealed. Natural 20 inflicts maximum + ULTIMATE.

entries.name: Blip Module
entries.description: A phase-movement augment. When you move, you do not pass through the space between the two locations.

entries.name: Cybernetics Loadout
entries.description: Your limbs and skeleton are augmented with nano fibers and duranium scaffolds. All forms of blunt impact inflict no damage.

entries.name: Zurin Symbiote
entries.description: The Zurin primordial form. This tiny organism binds to the spinal cord and enhances subtle empathy. 'Don't Die on me, man!' rolls are always EASY.

entries.name: Jump Pack
entries.description: A miniaturized ion thruster worn as a small backpack. Move twice on your TURN, even when taking an action or making an attack.

entries.name: Fire Water
entries.description: Nasty stuff. Viper venom mixed with monkey juice. 8 sips, pass out for 1D4 ROUNDS.

entries.name: Ammo Pouch
entries.description: Without one of these, you'll be lucky to keep 6 shots dry and in your pocket. 24 capacity.

entries.name: Cold Weather Gear
entries.description: Up above Buckskin it's terrible cold. Without this gear, you'll be dead in hours. +1 DEFENSE.

entries.name: Bull Whip
entries.description: Hard as hell to master, but makes for a nasty, useful tool in uncertain times. Can be used as WEAPON or grappler.

entries.name: Saddle & Tack
entries.description: A must for any riding. Includes lariat. Can be sold for 30 COIN, requires wagon or cart to transport.

entries.name: Manacles & Leg Irons
entries.description: Crucial gear for a Law man. Can also be forged with silver properties to restrain Infernals, Wraiths and the like.

entries.name: Coffee Outfit
entries.description: Conserve 1 SUPPLY when camping, grant all cohorts a HERO COIN at breakfast.

entries.name: Canuska Blanket
entries.description: A near-indestructible wool blanket with geometric patterns. Also shows friendship with Canuska tribes.

entries.name: Hepawa Hide Tent & Tack
entries.description: A compact, portable shelter for five. Can be used in cold, conserve 2 SUPPLIES per day. Requires wagon or cart to transport. Includes rope, iron spikes, and cooking gear.

entries.name: Six Shooter
entries.description: The standard sidearm of the West. Simple, reliable, uses 1 TURN to reload.

entries.name: Carbine Rifle
entries.description: Lever action, 8 capacity.

entries.name: Shotgun
entries.description: A nasty, clumsy weapon for close-quarters. 2 capacity, 1 TURN reload.

entries.name: Snub Shotgun
entries.description: Brutal scatter shots, 2 capacity. Hit any/all CLOSE targets in front of you when firing.

entries.name: Compound Bow
entries.description: Add STR to damage.

entries.name: Bowie Knife
entries.description: Here you have the most reliable thing on the mountain.

entries.name: Sabre
entries.description: Cavalry sword. Expensive, silver.

entries.name: Gatling Gun
entries.description: Godless death machine of the East. 4 shots per roll.

entries.name: Demonspine
entries.description: Fencing blade used by Infernals.

entries.name: Smoke Blade
entries.description: Caught 'tween worlds. Can only be touched by Infernals.

entries.name: Relic Pistol
entries.description: A haunted gun. 4 capacity.

entries.name: Elephant Rifle
entries.description: Biggest damn gun I ever saw. 1 capacity, always does ULTIMATE.

entries.name: Screamer
entries.description: Like a grenade, but it's a skull.

entries.name: Iron Cross
entries.description: Oak and cold iron, one huge spike. Simple, deadly, always does DOUBLE to Infernals.

entries.name: Nitro Bottle
entries.description: Careful with that, kid. Explosive on impact.

entries.name: Thumper Pistol
entries.description: Conceal easily. Does 3 SP (Stun Points) even when resisted.

entries.name: X-Tech Assault Rifle
entries.description: Weapon of future wars. Mod to take custom ammo or attached weapons.

entries.name: Plasteel Riot Armor
entries.description: Clunky but effective protection. +3 ARMOR, reduce any STUN damage done to you in any attack by 1.

entries.name: Ion Pack
entries.description: 1 use of FLIGHT POWER, recharge 1D4 ROUNDS.

entries.name: Micro Comms
entries.description: Keep in touch with teammates at any range, concealed and hands free.

entries.name: Utility Belt
entries.description: 3 med kits, 3 smoke grenades, rope, and one remote-triggered explosive brick.

entries.name: Adrenaline Pack
entries.description: On a successful RECOVERY, add +3 to your result.

entries.name: Team Suit
entries.description: Fireproof, tear-proof, protects against cold.

entries.name: Street Pack
entries.description: 3 pipe bombs, crow bar, folding ladder, crime scene kit, lock-picks and a signal flare.

entries.name: All The Knives
entries.description: Knives. So many knives. Even when throwing or breaking knives and swords, you always have more.

entries.name: Lapis Amulet
entries.description: A prized symbol of sacred power and tribal status. You've worn it long enough to command attention, and leadership suits you. +2 CHA.

entries.name: Delver's Pack
entries.description: 6 SLAGG spikes, 100 feet rope, flame pot, chalk, 10 SUPPLY, signal horn.

entries.name: Pommel Stone
entries.description: Attach to any weapon to improve its impact. +2 WEAPON EFFORT.

entries.name: Spear Tooth Pelts
entries.description: Ignore negative effects from extreme cold, even if pelts reduced to 0 ARMOR. +2 DEFENSE.

entries.name: Bracelets of Ord
entries.description: An age-old craft using antler and leather. REPAIR rolls are always EASY on these bracers, and the MENDER ABILITY is not needed. +3 DEFENSE.

entries.name: Codex Staff
entries.description: A wooden staff carved with truisms. These lessons can be used to decode mysteries. Possession of the codex staff also gives you literacy. +2 INT.

entries.name: Tusk Axe
entries.description: A vicious weapon made with ivory. On a critical fail, this weapon is NOT broken. +3 WEAPON EFFORT.

entries.name: Scale Shield
entries.description: A bulwark crafted from armadillo hide, and extremely tough. +8 DEFENSE.

entries.name: Birdman Cloak
entries.description: A suit of buzzard feathers and hide. Reduce any damage from falling by half. +3 DEFENSE.

entries.name: Potioner's Gourds
entries.description: Hollow shells used to hold odd tinctures and healing oils. Use with a HARD roll to heal 1 HP on yourself or an ally. +2 CON.

entries.name: Eye of Azatoth
entries.description: A red crystal 'eye' gem set in a silver amulet, crowned with tentacle and crab-like motifs. Cast INFERNAL SPELLS at half COST.

entries.name: Melman's Guide
entries.description: An exhaustive guide to dimensions, planes, portals and ley lines throughout the multiverse. Make an INT roll to locate a portal, ley line, or dimension gate within 1 mile.

entries.name: Exploding Ring
entries.description: This ring allows its wearer, with a verbal command, to explode a single object. Double the effects of any explosive SPELLS by destroying a target object up to 100 pounds.

entries.name: Iron Heart Shard
entries.description: A jagged piece of magical ore. Use your INT STAT to roll RECOVERY, then recover CON +1 HP as normal.

entries.name: Starfarer's Key
entries.description: Xenosian doorways can only be opened with this key-like device from deep space. Open ANY door instantly with a WIS roll.

entries.name: Gryphon Scarf
entries.description: A long, cable-knit scarf of red, gold and black with powerful, hidden magic. SPELLS are critical hits on an 18, 19 or 20.

entries.name: Dragon's Tooth
entries.description: The fang of a youngling dragon, one of Durathrax's offspring. Pray she does not see it on your person. Add a POISON effect to any attack. Targets take 1D4 damage for 1D4 ROUNDS.

entries.name: Wand of Wonders
entries.description: A small wooden staff, only three hands long, etched with spiral and antler motifs. Cast all SPELLS 1 LEVEL below actual COST.

entries.name: Odds 'N Ends
entries.description: Contains 6 rare ingredients. Convert 1 SPELL you know into a single use POTION with a single use.

entries.name: Spell Book
entries.description: This book teaches you the art of unlimited power. When casting a SPELL, and rolling MAGIC EFFORT on a D8, if you roll a natural 8, roll MAGIC EFFORT again. No limit.

entries.name: Roadman's Cloak
entries.description: These robes are extra durable, with pockets and padded reinforcement. The hood is deep and dark, concealing your identity to any passing glance. +2 ARMOR.

entries.name: Scrivener's Kit
entries.description: With an INT roll, learn any SPELL you see cast by doing 1 HEART of BASIC EFFORT in research. Bypasses any listed SPELL acquisition requirements.

entries.name: Power Crystal
entries.description: A glowing crystal. Destroy to cause an explosion big enough to destroy a town.

entries.name: Diminutive Servant
entries.description: As large as a bird, mouse or snake. Conjure and command this creature without a roll. If separated by more than 5 miles, it vanishes. The familiar has 1 HP.

entries.name: Zeke's Codex of Monsters and Men
entries.description: With an INT roll, discern a key fact or weakness in any enemy you have experienced. These details are also accessible later from the book with no roll.

entries.name: Gem of Changes
entries.description: With an INT roll, change the natural element of a SPELL, such as ice to fire.

entries.name: Nomad's Bundle
entries.description: This rolled up pack contains: 3 small Healing Potions (1D8 each), 5 SUPPLY, Arrows, 3 torches, a small tent and a 50' length of rope.

entries.name: A Wizard's Blade
entries.description: This elegant short sword, rapier, dagger or kris knife is balanced for fast, lightweight attacks. Use your INT to roll ATTACK. If lost, make an INT roll on a common WEAPON to enchant it.
